value.found_quote: Built exactly this! Levitation is an open-source mobile interface for Antigravity. You can start new tasks, chat with agents, and approve decisions from your phone. No cloud relay — runs a local client that bridges to a web dashboard.
value.rationale: The page describes a third-party, community-built open-source tool called "Levitation" created by a forum user (ggarber), not an official Google offering. The claim is that *Google* offers remote control (mobile/web) for steering or approving agent runs. The page does not describe any official Google product or feature providing this capability — it is a user-created project posted in a community forum. Therefore, the page does not substantiate the claim that Google itself offers this feature.
